promotion_guardrail: Proposal-side only. Do not promote to A2-1 kernel law from this batch without a later explicit selective promotion pass.

selection_basis.queue_reason: Selected as the next process-facing existing intake batch to refine without starting a new raw-source family.
selection_basis.parent_reason: The parent batch already exposed reusable outer-interface patterns around atomic routing, validator handoff, provenance gating, and macro compression.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Intentionally deferred because this step stays within existing intake artifacts and preserves the parent batch's single-doc boundary.
Likely best next existing intake reduction after this outer-interface pass.

raw_source_reread_reason: The parent batch already isolates the reusable engine patterns and explicit limits required for this bounded reduction pass.

reasons_for_candidate_status: These candidates isolate the least noisy and most reusable outer-interface patterns from the parent batch.
They preserve source-local limits while still surfacing practical routing and provenance patterns.
They stay fully source-linked to existing intake artifacts without requiring a fresh raw-doc pass.
reasons_for_quarantine_status: Thread-local commands, local rule ids, and paired-thread contract pieces are too source-specific for cleaner reuse right now.
The parent batch itself marks family-level completeness as unread until Thread B is processed.
notes: Operated from existing intake artifacts after prior required control-surface reads.
Kept the pass single-parent and bounded rather than pulling in the deferred Thread B source.
No raw core-doc reread was needed for this bounded outer-interface reduction pass.
